name: Universal App Store
subtitle: One of the best app stores!

apps.name: XinaA12
apps.subtitle: XinaA15 jailbreak for iOS 15.0–15.1.1
apps.localizedDescription: XinaA15 (often referred to as Xina Jailbreak) is a semi-untethered jailbreak designed for iOS 15.0 through 15.1.1 on compatible devices. It provides rootless jailbreak functionality, enabling tweak injection, system customization, and package management through a modified jailbreak environment. XinaA15 is intended for advanced users and developers and focuses on early iOS 15 jailbreak support with experimental stability improvements.

apps.name: Etason JB
apps.subtitle: EtasonJB jailbreak for iOS 8.4.1 (32-bit)
apps.localizedDescription: EtasonJB is a semi-untethered jailbreak designed for 32-bit iOS devices running iOS 8.4.1. It enables system customization, tweak installation, and package management on supported legacy devices. EtasonJB is built for older hardware and focuses on stability and compatibility for iOS 8 environments.

apps.name: OD1N
apps.subtitle: Od1n jailbreak utility for iOS 15–16.x
apps.localizedDescription: Od1n is a jailbreak-related utility designed for compatible iOS devices, providing exploit-based functionality and system-level tools used in jailbreak workflows. It is intended for advanced users and developers, offering features for device inspection, testing, and jailbreak environment support on supported firmware versions. Some builds may include experimental or development-stage components.

apps.name: FREYA15
apps.subtitle: FREYA15 jailbreak for iOS 15.x.
apps.localizedDescription: FREYA15 is a jailbreak tool designed for compatible devices running iOS 15.x. It provides exploit-based system access to enable customization, tweak injection, and advanced device modification on supported firmware. This build is intended for developers and advanced users, and may include experimental features depending on device and iOS version compatibility.

apps.name: MeridianFix
apps.subtitle: Meridian jailbreak fix for iOS 10.
apps.localizedDescription: MeridianFix is a patched and updated build of the Meridian jailbreak designed to improve stability and compatibility on iOS 10 devices. It provides semi-untethered jailbreak functionality, enabling tweak injection, system customization, and package manager support on supported firmware. This build focuses on fixing known issues in earlier Meridian releases for a smoother jailbreak experience on legacy devices.

apps.name: rootlessJB4
apps.subtitle: Rootless jailbreak for iOS 12–13
apps.localizedDescription: rootlessJB4 is a lightweight, rootless jailbreak designed for compatible iOS 12 and iOS 13 devices. It focuses on providing basic jailbreak functionality without modifying the system root filesystem, enabling safer system tweaks and development testing. This build is primarily intended for developers and advanced users experimenting with jailbreak techniques and compatibility.

apps.name: Phoenix
apps.subtitle: Phoenix jailbreak for iOS 9.3.5.
apps.localizedDescription: Phoenix is a semi-untethered jailbreak designed for 32-bit iOS devices running iOS 9.3.5. It enables system customization, tweak installation, and third-party package management through Cydia on supported legacy devices. Phoenix is optimized for older hardware and provides a stable jailbreak solution for iOS 9 users.

apps.name: p0laris
apps.subtitle: p0laris jailbreak for iOS 9.3.4–9.3.5.
apps.localizedDescription: p0laris is a jailbreak tool designed for 64-bit iOS devices running iOS 9.3.4 and 9.3.5. It provides kernel-level exploit functionality to enable system customization, tweak injection, and third-party package management on supported devices. Built for legacy firmware, p0laris focuses on stability and compatibility for older iOS environments.

apps.name: EverPwnage
apps.subtitle: iOS 8.0 - 9.3.6 Jailbreak for 32-bit Devices
apps.localizedDescription: EverPwnage is a jailbreak tool designed for older, legacy iOS devices and firmware versions. It provides exploit-based access to enable device customization, tweak injection, and package manager support on compatible systems. EverPwnage is intended for advanced users working with legacy iOS environments and focuses on extending jailbreak functionality to older hardware and software combinations.

apps.name: Electra
apps.subtitle: Electra jailbreak for iOS 11.0–11.4.1.
apps.localizedDescription: Electra is a semi-untethered jailbreak developed by CoolStar for iOS 11.0 through iOS 11.4.1. It enables system customization, tweak injection, and third-party package management using Cydia or Sileo depending on the build. Electra uses kernel-level exploits to provide a stable jailbreak experience for supported devices on iOS 11.

apps.name: daibutsu
apps.subtitle: iOS 8.4.1 Jailbreak optimized for A5 devices.
apps.localizedDescription: Daibutsu is a jailbreak-related utility designed for compatible iOS devices, providing system-level access and exploit-based functionality for supported firmware versions. It is intended for advanced users and developers working within the iOS jailbreak ecosystem, offering tools and features used in testing, research, and device modification workflows. Daibutsu may include experimental components depending on the build.

apps.name: Dopamine
apps.subtitle: Dopamine jailbreak for iOS 15–16.6.1.
apps.localizedDescription: Dopamine is a semi-untethered jailbreak developed for iOS 15 through iOS 16.6.1. It uses modern exploit techniques to enable rootless system modifications, tweak injection, and full device customization while maintaining system stability. Dopamine is designed for performance and reliability on modern iOS versions and supports a wide range of compatible devices with a focus on a clean, user-friendly jailbreak experience.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Dopamine needs to access your photo library to support picking a boot logo

apps.name: Taurine
apps.subtitle: Taurine jailbreak for iOS 14.0–14.8.1.
apps.localizedDescription: Taurine is a semi-untethered jailbreak developed by CoolStar for iOS 14 through iOS 14.3. It provides full system customization capabilities including tweak injection, theming, and package management via Sileo. Taurine is optimized for speed and stability, offering a modern jailbreak experience with improved reliability and performance across supported devices.

apps.name: Odyssey
apps.subtitle: Odyssey jailbreak for iOS 13–13.7.
apps.localizedDescription: Odyssey is a semi-untethered jailbreak developed for iOS 13 through iOS 13.7. It uses modern exploit chains to provide system-level access, enabling tweak injection, theming, and advanced device customization. Odyssey includes support for the Sileo package manager and is designed with stability, performance, and a smooth user experience in mind for supported devices.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: For selecting a custom theme image

apps.name: Chimera Patched
apps.subtitle: Patched Chimera jailbreak for iOS 12.
apps.localizedDescription: Chimera Patched is a modified version of the original Chimera jailbreak designed for compatibility fixes and extended device support on iOS 12.x firmware. It provides a semi-untethered jailbreak experience with support for tweak injection, system customization, and package management through Sileo. This patched build is intended for advanced users and testers and may include experimental or unofficial modifications not present in the original release.

apps.name: Chimera
apps.subtitle: Chimera jailbreak for iOS 12–12.5.7.
apps.localizedDescription: Chimera is a jailbreak tool developed by the Electra Team for compatible iOS 12 devices. It provides a semi-untethered jailbreak experience with support for tweak injection, system customization, and package management via Sileo. Chimera is designed to be stable and efficient, focusing on performance and reliability for supported firmware versions in the iOS 12 jailbreak ecosystem.

apps.name: unc0ver
apps.subtitle: Jailbreak devices on 11.0 to 14.8
apps.localizedDescription: unc0ver is a jailbreak tool designed for supported iOS versions, using kernel-level exploits to enable customization, system access, and third-party package installation on compatible devices. It provides a semi-untethered jailbreak experience with support for tweak injection, filesystem access, and jailbreak management tools. This build is intended for advanced users and developers working within the iOS jailbreak ecosystem.

apps.name: kokeshi9
apps.subtitle: Jailbreak 64-bit devices on 9.2 to 9.3.5.
apps.localizedDescription: kok3shi99999 beta is a development build of the kok3shi jailbreak for compatible 64-bit devices on older iOS versions. It is intended for testing and experimental use, providing kernel-level exploitation to enable jailbreak functionality on supported firmware. This build is unstable and primarily used by developers and advanced users for compatibility testing and research purposes.

apps.name: wtfis
apps.subtitle: Untethered iOS 8.0 - 8.4.1 64-bit Jailbreak
apps.localizedDescription: WTFis is a jailbreak-related utility designed for supported iOS versions, providing access to system-level information and internal device details used in jailbreak environments. It is intended for advanced users and developers working with jailbroken devices, offering insights into system state, device properties, and runtime environment data in a simple interface.

apps.name: socket
apps.subtitle: iOS 10 semi-untethered jailbreak for 32 bit devices.
apps.localizedDescription: Socket is an iOS utility designed for compatible devices running supported versions of iOS. It provides the functionality required by various customization and system-management tools, serving as a foundation for supported workflows within the iOS community. The app is lightweight, easy to use, and intended for devices that meet its version and compatibility requirements.

apps.name: Scarlet
apps.subtitle: Personal Scarlet sideloading client.
apps.localizedDescription: Scarlet Personal is a modified build of Scarlet designed for personal sideloading and app management on iOS. It provides tools for installing and organizing IPA files, managing repositories, and maintaining a personal app library. With support for custom sources and streamlined installation workflows, Scarlet Personal offers a convenient way to manage sideloaded applications directly from your device.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: This app needs to access the local network to do wireless installs.

apps.name: AltStore
apps.subtitle: Alternative app marketplace for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: AltStore is an alternative app marketplace that allows users to sideload and manage applications on iPhone and iPad using their own Apple ID. It features support for app sources, IPA installation, automatic app refreshing through AltServer, and a growing ecosystem of community-created apps. AltStore provides a user-friendly way to discover, install, and maintain apps outside of the traditional App Store experience.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: AltStore uses the local network to find and communicate with AltServer.

apps.name: SideStore
apps.subtitle: Refresh and sideload apps anywhere.
apps.localizedDescription: SideStore is an open-source iOS sideloading application that allows users to install, refresh, and manage IPA files directly on their device. Built as an alternative to AltStore, it enables app refreshing without requiring a computer on the same network by using a dedicated VPN-based pairing system. SideStore supports custom sources, app management, and convenient sideloading workflows, making it a powerful solution for installing apps outside the App Store.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: SideStore uses the local network to find and communicate with your device.

apps.name: Feather
apps.subtitle: Modern IPA signing and sideloading.
apps.localizedDescription: Feather is a modern iOS sideloading application that lets users sign, manage, and install IPA files directly on their device. Featuring a clean interface, certificate and provisioning profile management, repository support, and app library organization, Feather streamlines the sideloading experience while making it easy to discover, sign, and install applications from trusted sources.

apps.name: ESign
apps.subtitle: Sign and install IPA files on iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: ESign is an iOS app signing utility that allows users to import, sign, and install IPA files directly on their device using compatible certificates and provisioning profiles. It includes tools for certificate management, app signing, IPA importing, and installation, providing a convenient way to manage sideloaded applications without requiring a computer for everyday use.

apps.name: Ksign
apps.subtitle: On-device IPA signing and installation.
apps.localizedDescription: Ksign is a lightweight iOS application that allows users to sign and install IPA files directly on their device using personal certificates. It features certificate management, provisioning profile support, app library organization, and a clean interface designed for sideloading workflows. Ksign makes it easy to import, sign, and install apps without needing a computer after initial setup.
